_readme: GitHub MCP server — already bundled with GitHub Copilot CLI. For Claude Code and Codex CLI, install separately.

_setup.4_copilot_cli_note: GitHub Copilot CLI already includes the GitHub MCP server — no extra setup needed.

_tools_provided: search_repositories — find repos by name, topic, language
get_file_contents — read a file from any repo
get_pull_request — fetch PR details and diff
list_commits — get commit history for a branch
_skill_pairings: skills/engineer/continuous-delivery — uses list_workflow_runs to diagnose CI
skills/manager/engineering-metrics — uses commit and PR data for DORA metrics
